A little bit cottagecore, a little bit vintage charm, and completely one-of-a-kind.

This sweet wooden bow shelf is ready to add a touch of warmth and whimsy to your favorite corner. Perfect for displaying tiny treasures, a bud vase, a favorite trinket, or that special piece that deserves its own spotlight.

🍀✨ Some treasures are found. Others seem to find you. ✨🍀

At Hiraeth Haven, every piece has a story waiting for its next chapter. From delicate vintage glass and charming cottage-core décor, our shelves are full of little moments of nostalgia.

Whether you’re hunting for the perfect statement piece, adding to a collection, or simply browsing for something that makes your heart smile, you never know what treasure is waiting around the corner.

After all… not everyone is lucky enough to find it. 💚

🛍 Shop online: HiraethHaven.com
💌 Offers welcome

#hiraethhaven #hiraethhavenshop #vintagefinds #olympiawa #thrift

🐓🌾 Cock-a-doodle-doo, your spice cabinet just got a whole lot cuter!

Straight from mid-century Japan, this charming rooster spice set is serving farmhouse flair with a side of nostalgia. Featuring four ceramic spice jars tucked neatly into their original wooden wall rack, it’s the kind of kitchen treasure that instantly makes a space feel warm, lived-in, and loved.

Whether you’re a collector of vintage kitchenware, a fan of mid-century décor, or simply someone who appreciates quirky treasures with character, this little flock is ready to roost in its next home.

🍀For those lucky enough to find it 
🛍️ Available at HiraethHaven.com
